name: gtech-developer-erp-v3
description: G-Tech Developer ERP v3 | جيتك المطور | أ. علاء غبن | 01014868778

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd core && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install

_comment_dependencies: express/multer/xlsx are required here (root node_modules) because plugins/*/index.js live as siblings of core/ and Node's module resolution walks UP from plugins/<key>/ to gtech-erp-v3/node_modules — they would NOT be found in core/node_modules. Do not remove.
